syntax_11212.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11212.title: Attribute Modifier - Properties
syntax_11212.description:
Gets or sets a property of an attribute modifier. The properties can be set to the following:
- Attribute: attribute type
- Name: string
- UUID: string
- Amount: number
- Slot: equipment slot
- Operation: attribute modifier operation
syntax_11212.syntax_pattern:
[attribute[ ]]modifier attribute of %attributemodifiers%
[attribute[ ]]modifier name of %attributemodifiers%
[attribute[ ]]modifier (amount|increment) of %attributemodifiers%
[attribute[ ]]modifier operat(or|ion) of %attributemodifiers%
[attribute[ ]]modifier slot of %attributemodifiers%
[attribute[ ]]modifier uuid of %attributemodifiers%

en:
Gets or sets a property of an attribute modifier. The properties can be set to the following:
- Attribute: attribute type
- Name: string
- UUID: string
- Amount: number
- Slot: equipment slot
- Operation: attribute modifier operation

syntax_11213.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11213.title: Attribute Modifiers - Item
syntax_11213.description:
Gets or modifies the attribute modifiers of an item.
This will always return a list, even if there's only 1.

en:
Gets or modifies the attribute modifiers of an item.
This will always return a list, even if there's only 1.

syntax_11214.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11214.title: Attribute Modifier
syntax_11214.description:
Represents an attribute modifier.
Due to the complexity of these, they cannot be stored in variables long term.

en:
Represents an attribute modifier.
Due to the complexity of these, they cannot be stored in variables long term.

syntax_11215.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11215.title: Attribute Modifier - Operation
syntax_11215.description: Represents the operations an attribute modifier can use.
syntax_11215.type_usage: add number, multiply number, multiply scalar 1

en: Represents the operations an attribute modifier can use.

syntax_11217.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11217.title: Has Attribute Modifiers
syntax_11217.description: Checks if an item has any attribute modifiers.

en: Checks if an item has any attribute modifiers.

syntax_11211.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11211.title: Attribute Modifier - Create
syntax_11211.description:
Creates a new attribute modifier, which can be applied to items.
All of the optional parts in the pattern (the operation, uuid, and slot), have default values as follows:
- Operation: add number
- UUID: random uuid
- Slot: all slots (which is actually stored as no slot)

Keep in mind that attributes can only be modified to their min and max values.
For more information, see the [SkCheez wiki page](https://github.com/cheeezburga/SkCheez/wiki/attribute-modifiers) or the [Minecraft wiki page](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute).
syntax_11211.syntax_pattern: [new] %attributetype% [attribute] modifier (named|with name|with id) %string% with amount %number% [with operation %-attributemodifieroperation%] [with uuid %-string%] [for [equipment] slot %-equipmentslot%]

en:
Creates a new attribute modifier, which can be applied to items.
All of the optional parts in the pattern (the operation, uuid, and slot), have default values as follows:
- Operation: add number
- UUID: random uuid
- Slot: all slots (which is actually stored as no slot)

Keep in mind that attributes can only be modified to their min and max values.
For more information, see the [SkCheez wiki page](https://github.com/cheeezburga/SkCheez/wiki/attribute-modifiers) or the [Minecraft wiki page](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute).

syntax_11216.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11216.title: Equipment Slot
syntax_11216.description: Represents the equipment slots that (in SkCheez) an attribute modifier can use. Other addons might register this type and use it in their syntax as well.
syntax_11216.type_usage: hand slot, off hand slot, head slot, chest slot, legs slot, feet slot

en: Represents the equipment slots that (in SkCheez) an attribute modifier can use. Other addons might register this type and use it in their syntax as well.
